ticket.title: Triage incoming bug reports for the beta
ticket.description: Sort and shape the beta bug reports: reproduce, label, and decide which block GA. Mostly scheduling and search issues.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the scheduling acceptance bugs are judged against

code_agent.rationale: Code sees the two ticket acceptance notes and the codebase context; the agent's local scratch and Alice's local todo are private, the rejected decision is withheld. Personas is in scope but loosely relevant to bug triage — optional.

qa_agent.rationale: QA needs the acceptance notes, the test strategy, and the perf budget; personas (project) is out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, both local notes are private.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the ticket notes and personas; codebase entries are out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, both local notes are private.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees the ticket notes and personas; codebase entries are out of scope, the rejected decision is withheld, both local notes are private.

human_teammate.rationale: Alice sees every team-visible entry, the rejected decision (flagged), AND her own local todo; only the agent's private scratch is invisible to her.
